## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal change

<!-- Closes #123 -->

## How was this tested?

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] Added new tests for changed behavior
- [ ] Manually tested CLI: <!-- which commands? -->
- [ ] Manually tested MCP server: <!-- which tools / which client? -->

## Project principles checklist

- [ ] Local-first: works without remote services for the default path
- [ ] Provider-agnostic: no hardcoded LLM/embeddings vendor
- [ ] No telemetry / no network calls beyond what the user configured
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private hostnames in code or tests
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (255+)

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] `docs/` updated (if applicable)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated (if new config option)
